notes: **Batch 5 hold-out case** — added 2026-05-08 to validate hybrid-v2's 120k threshold WITHOUT retuning. Fills the v2 `java-gradle` ecosystem gap (was 0/v2). Spring Boot's `checkFormatMain` Gradle task is a code-style gate; one file (`SbomProperties.java`) has formatting violations. failure_category=lint_error fits cleanest of the closed-set enums (formatting-as-lint). framework=generic because Gradle's Spring Boot Plugin is its own thing distinct from cargo/pytest/jest etc. Late signal_position (failure block at ~98%). Easy diagnosis difficulty: the failure block is self-contained and names the offending file at line-resolution. log_size_bucket=large (6275 lines).
